questions.questionText: Concerning congenital ureteropelvic junction (UPJ) obstruction, which one of the following is TRUE?

options.text: It is an uncommon cause of hydronephrosis in children.
Urinary tract infection is the most common presentation.
Females and males are affected equally.
The presence of crossing vessels decreases the success rate of pyeloplasty.

questions.explanation:
(A) 錯：[[UPJ obstruction]]UPJ obstruction 是兒童水腎最常見的原因，不是 uncommon。
(B) 錯：最常見的表現是產前超音波發現的水腎（incidental hydronephrosis），或是間歇性腰痛，UTI 是可能表現之一但非最常見。
(C) 錯：男性多於女性。
(D) 正確：Crossing vessel 的存在會降低 endopyelotomy 的成功率（從約 82% 降至 33%），因此影響手術方式的選擇。不過需注意，crossing vessel 降低的主要是 endopyelotomy 的成功率；對 dismembered pyeloplasty 而言影響較小，因為 pyeloplasty 可以將 UPJ 重建至 crossing vessel 前方。

questions.questionText: Concerning adrenal adenomas, which one is TRUE?

options.text: They are a more common cause of adrenal mass than is metastatic disease.
They typically have non-IV contrast density of more than 20 Hounsfield units.
They typically show no decrease in signal intensity on opposed phase MR imaging.
They typically retain 90% of their immediate contrast value on 10-minute delayed CT exam.

questions.explanation:
A. 正確. Adrenal adenoma 佔所有腎上腺 incidentaloma 的 75%[1]，一般人群盛行率約 3%[2]。即使在已知有惡性腫瘤的病人中，大多數腎上腺腫塊仍為良性[3]。轉移瘤在 incidentaloma 中僅佔約 1–2%[4]。因此 adenoma 遠比 metastasis 常見。
B. **錯誤**. 腎上腺腺瘤在非顯影 CT 上密度 ≤10 HU 即可確診[5]。約 70% 為 lipid-rich，密度範圍約 −2 至 16 HU；lipid-poor 腺瘤則約 20–25 HU[6]。因此「典型」腺瘤密度低於 10 HU，而非超過 20 HU。
C. **錯誤**. Opposed-phase MRI 上的訊號下降是腎上腺腺瘤最具特徵性的表現[7]。腺瘤因含有**細胞內脂質**，在 chemical shift imaging 的 opposed-phase 序列上會出現明顯 signal dropout，這是與轉移瘤鑑別的關鍵。
D. **錯誤**. 腺瘤的特性是**快速 washout**。研究顯示腺瘤在注射顯影劑後 5 分鐘即開始快速排出，15 分鐘時 washout 達 50–60%；相反地，非腺瘤（如轉移瘤）則傾向保留顯影劑8。診斷標準為 absolute washout >60% 或 relative washout >40%[7]，代表腺瘤在延遲相會大幅washout。
1. PMC4429195 — Incidental Adrenal Nodules and Masses: The Imaging Approach ↩
2. ScienceDirect — Adrenal Adenoma: An Overview ↩
3. AJR Online — Imaging of Adrenal Incidentalomas: Current Status ↩
4. Korean Endocrine Society — Clinical Guidelines for the Management of Adrenal Incidentaloma ↩
5. Medscape — Adrenal Adenoma Imaging: Practice Essentials ↩

questions.questionText: What was the principal finding of the ACCURACY (Assessment by Coronary Computed Tomographic Angiography of Individuals Undergoning Invasive Coronary Angiography) trial in terms of detection of > 70% stenosis?

options.text: Sensitivity and NPV > 90%, PPV < 75%
Sensitivity 80%, NPV > 90%, PPV< 75%
Sensitivity >90%, PPV> 90%, NPV > 90%

questions.explanation:
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/19007693/
ACCURACY 試驗是一項前瞻multicenter研究，評估 64切 CCTA 對無已知冠狀動脈疾病患者的診斷準確性。
共 230 名受試者同時接受 CCTA 與 ICA 檢查（59.1% 男性，平均年齡 57 ± 10 歲） 。
Detection of ≥70% stenosis:
Sensitivity: 94%
Specificity: 83%
Positive predictive value (PPV): 48%
Negative predictive value (NPV): **99%** 代表 CCTA 可以 rule out significant (≥70%) coronary stenosis. 幾乎可確定排除具臨床意義的冠狀動脈狹窄，患者得以避免侵入性心導管檢查。
但冠狀動脈calcium score >400 時，特異度顯著下降（鈣化斑塊產生 blooming artifact，導致偽陽性增加）
PPV 僅 48% 反映了較高的偽陽性率，意味著 CCTA 陽性結果仍需以侵入性攝影確認。整體而言，此試驗支持 CCTA 在中等前測機率族群中作為第一線非侵入性「守門員」檢查的角色——其最大價值在於 rule-out（排除） 而非 rule-in。

questions.questionText: What is the following description about "histopathologically a small (<= 3 cm) and predominantly lepidic growth that has 5-mm or smaller invasion, which at CT is mainly nonsolid but may have a central solid component of up to approximately 5 mm", according to 2011 classification of Classification of the spectrum of adenocarcinoma of the Lung?

options.text: Adenocarcinoma in situ (AIS)
Minimally invasive adenocarcinoma (MIA)
Adenocarcinoma in situ (AIS)
Invasive mucinous adenocarcinoma

questions.explanation:
Preinvasive Lesions
AAH（**Atypical Adenomatous Hyperplasia**，非典型腺瘤性增生）
病理：≤5 mm 的局灶性肺泡上皮非典型增生，沿肺泡壁生長
CT：純毛玻璃結節（pure GGN），≤5 mm

**Adenocarcinoma in Situ** (AIS，原位腺癌)
病理：≤3 cm，純 lepidic 生長（沿肺泡壁），無侵犯 RSNA；無間質、血管或胸膜侵犯 
黏液性：通常為非黏液性，少數可為黏液性 
CT：通常為純毛玻璃結節（nonsolid） 

**Minimally Invasive Adenocarcinoma** (MIA，微浸潤腺癌)
病理：≤3 cm，以 lepidic 生長為主，侵犯範圍 ≤5 mm 
CT：主要為毛玻璃密度，可有中央實質成分約 ≤5 mm 

**Invasive Adenocarcinoma**（浸潤性腺癌）
侵犯成分 >5 mm。依優勢組織型態分型（以 5% 增量半定量評估，選出單一優勢型態） ：
- Lepidic predominant 病理：以非黏液性 lepidic 生長為優勢的浸潤性腺癌（侵犯 >5 mm）；CT：通常為 part-solid 結節，亦可為 nonsolid 或有囊性成分 
- Acinar predominant（腺泡優勢型）病理：以腺泡型態（圓形/橢圓形腺腔結構）為優勢
- Papillary predominant（乳突優勢型）病理：以乳突狀結構（含纖維血管軸心）為優勢
- Micropapillary predominant（微乳突優勢型）病理：2011 分類新增的組織學亞型 ；腫瘤細胞形成無纖維血管軸心的小簇狀突起
- Solid predominant with mucin production（實質優勢型伴黏液產生）病理：以片狀實質生長為優勢，需有細胞內黏液證據

Variants（變異型）
Invasive mucinous adenocarcinoma (IMA，浸潤性黏液型腺癌)
病理：原分類之 mucinous BAC，現改稱 IMA American Journal of Respiratory and Critical Care Medicine；以杯狀/柱狀黏液細胞沿肺泡壁生長為主
CT：表現差異大，從實質結節到肺實質化均可見 RSNA

Colloid adenocarcinoma（膠狀腺癌）
Fetal adenocarcinoma（胎兒型腺癌）
Enteric adenocarcinoma（腸型腺癌）

Ref: https://pubs.rsna.org/doi/full/10.1148/radiol.12120240

questions.questionText: About rhinocerebral mucormycosis, which of the following descriptions is **false**?

options.text: Typically affecting diabetic or immunocompromised patients
A necrotizing vasculitis that extends rapidly into deep face, orbits, cranial cavity, and brain
Enhancement patterns are variable, ranging from homogeneous to heterogenous or non-enhancing at all.
Signal intensity of mucormycosis lesions tends to be hyperintense on T2WI and hypointensity on T1WI
May result in cerebral infarction

questions.explanation:
: Variable T2(20% high); iso T1
T1: isointense lesions relative to brain in most cases (~80%)
T2: fungal elements themselves tend to have low signal on T2
       variable with around 20% of patients showing high T2 signal
T1 C+ (Gd): the devitalised mucosa appears non-enhancing tissue, leading to he black turbinate sign
- **A) TRUE** — 搜尋資料明確指出 ROCM 好發於糖尿病控制不佳及免疫抑制患者。
- **B) TRUE** — PMC 文獻描述 Mucorales 造成 necrotizing vasculitis，經顱底孔道及裂隙迅速擴散至深部面部、眼眶及腦部。
- **C) TRUE** — 影像文獻記載顯影模式多變，從均勻顯影、不均勻顯影到完全不顯影（壞死組織）皆可出現。
- **D) ❌ FALSE** — 這是本題的錯誤選項。根據搜尋資料，ROCM 病灶在 **T1WI 多呈等訊號（80%）**，而 **T2WI 傾向等訊號至低訊號**（僅 20% 呈高訊號）。T2 低訊號是因為真菌菌絲含有順磁性物質（鐵、錳），這恰好與一般感染性病灶的 T2 高訊號相反，是重要的鑑別線索。選項描述的「T2 hyperintense, T1 hypointense」是典型發炎/水腫的訊號特徵，並非 mucormycosis 的特點。
- **E) TRUE** — 真菌的血管侵襲性造成血管血栓，可導致腦梗塞，文獻中有明確記載。

questions.questionText: Which statement is **wrong**?

options.text: Hemangioblastoma is the most common retinal tumor in the children and associated with von Hippel Lindau disease.

Many benign and malignant entities share clinical and imaging features with rhabdomyosarcoma, but the presence of unilateral, rapidly progressive proptosis must always raise concern for rhabdomyosarcoma.
Children calcifications in the globe mean retinoblastoma until proven otherwise even if it is bilateral.
Retinoblastoma is usually detected through leukocoria as it occurs in two third of patients with retinoblastoma.

A. 最常見是retinoblastoma。Hemangioblastoma（retinal capillary hemangioblastoma）與 von Hippel-Lindau disease 相關是正確的

C.  **正確**。Retinoblastoma 30-40%是雙側。遺傳型多為雙側且多焦點。
D. **正確**。Leukocoria 出現在約三分之二的 retinoblastoma 患者中，是最常見的臨床表現。

Typically necrobacillosis, an anaerobic Gram-positive cocci, Fusobacterium necrophorum, is responsible for a majority of cases. Gram-negative cocci
Infection spreads from the peritonsillar space into the internal jugular vein, causing thrombus formation.
The rates of morbidity and mortality are higher than with other head and neck infections.

questions.explanation:
(B?) C. parapharyngeal space B. Gram-negative bacillus
- pharyngitis/tonsillitis with or without peritonsillar or retropharyngeal abscess
- During the primary infection, F. necrophorum colonizes the infection site and the infection spreads to the parapharyngeal space. The bacteria then invade the peritonsillar blood vessels where they can spread to the internal jugular vein. In this vein, the bacteria cause the formation of a thrombus containing these bacteria.

questions.questionText: About Lemierre's syndrome, which of the following statement is wrong?

options.text: Also known as postanginal sepsis and necrobacillosis, is the suppurative thrombophlebitis of jugular vein.
The condition is frequently preceded by pharyngitis, usually in association with tonsil or peritonsillar involvement.
The causative organisms are usually members of the normal oropharyngeal flora; the most common is Fusobacterium necrophorum
Imaging hallmark include pharyngitis, infectious lymphadenitis, and thrombosis of jugular vein. Septic emboli to lungs are rare.

questions.explanation: Bacteremia and distal infective thromboembolism is common (lungs most commonly affected). A significant proportion of patients (13% to 27%) will require diagnostic arthrocentesis due to symptoms of septic arthritis. Meningitis has also been shown to complicate up to 3% of cases.

questions.questionText: Concerning congenital ureteropelvic junction (UPJ) obstruction, which one of the following is TRUE?

options.text: It is an uncommon cause of hydronephrosis in children.
Urinary tract infection is the most common presentation.
Females and males are affected equally.
The presence of crossing vessels decreases the success rate of pyeloplasty.

questions.explanation:
- **(A) 錯**：UPJ obstruction 是兒童水腎最常見的原因，不是 uncommon。
- **(B) 錯**：最常見的表現是產前超音波發現的水腎（incidental hydronephrosis），或是間歇性腰痛，UTI 是可能表現之一但非最常見。
- **(C) 錯**：男性多於女性。
- **(D) 正確**：Crossing vessel 的存在會**降低 endopyelotomy 的成功率**（從約 82% 降至 33%），因此影響手術方式的選擇。不過需注意，crossing vessel 降低的主要是 endopyelotomy 的成功率；對 dismembered pyeloplasty 而言影響較小，因為 pyeloplasty 可以將 UPJ 重建至 crossing vessel 前方。

questions.questionText: About ultrasonogrpahy artifacts, which description is **incorrect**?

options.text: Solid masses that attenuate sound less than adjacent soft tissues may cause **posterior enhancement**.
Bone and the back wall of the carotid can act as **mirrors** for color Doppler imaging due to marked contrast between soft tissue and vascular structure.
The **ring down** artifact occurs posterior to air-bubbles, because ultrasound cause resonate vibration of the fluid trapped between bubbles.
The most widely recognized **refraction** artifact occurs at the junction of the rectus abdominis muscle and abdominal wall fat.
None of above

questions.explanation:
A. Attenuation 衰減：聲波在介質中傳播時振幅和強度會慢慢減少。衰減較少後方較強
D. The most widely recognized **refraction** artifact occurs at the junction of the rectus abdominis muscle and abdominal wall fat. 來源?

questions.questionText: Which one is **incorrect** about ultrasound artifact

options.text: **Ring down** occurs most frequently due to gas, and metal is also capable of producing a ring-down artifact.
A high resistance arterial waveform in spermatic artery may be the only imaging finding in partial torsion.
**Aliasing** is a well-known artifact that occurs when the Doppler sampling rate is more than twice the Doppler frequency shift
None of above. (All of above are correct)

questions.explanation:
Nyquist limit=PRF/2。超過會產生 aliasing artifact。主要是sampling rate不夠快。所以應該是less than。![[ADD US Aliasing artifact.png]] Doppler中 upper margin of the velocity scale調太低也會導致(波峰被截斷，出現在基線對側（wrap-around）)。
- A. Ring-Down appears mostly due to gas (rather than metal, as in the case of comet tail artifact)
- B. intratesticular arteries 正常是低阻力，阻力變大要懷疑partial torsion。

questions.questionText: Regarding lung cancer, which of the following statement is **NOT** correct?

options.text: In small cell lung cancer, when tumor and metastatic lesion cannot be encompassed in the same radiation port, it is called extensive disease.
Adenocarcinoma is the most common cell type of lung cancer in women and nonsmokers.
Atypical adenomatous hyperplasia, adenocarcinoma in situ, and minimally invasive adenocarcinoma are staged in the 8th edition of TNM system.
Pleural thickening adjacent to the tumor seen in CT is not very accurate for chest wall invasion.

questions.explanation:
**選項 (A) ✅ 正確**
- SCLC 的 extensive disease 定義源自 VALSG 分類系統，指的是腫瘤負擔無法被一個放射治療照野涵蓋的情況，包括惡性肋膜積液及/或遠處轉移 [PubMed Central](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6003267/)。
- limited disease 是指腫瘤侷限於同側胸腔、縱隔腔或鎖骨上淋巴結，可被涵蓋在一個可耐受的放射治療照野內 [NCI](https://www.cancer.gov/types/lung/hp/small-cell-lung-treatment-pdq)。因此，當腫瘤和轉移病灶無法涵蓋在同一個放射治療照野內，即為 extensive disease，敘述正確。
**選項 (B) ✅ 正確** Adenocarcinoma 是女性及非吸菸者最常見的肺癌細胞型態，這是公認的事實。
**選項 (C) ❌ 不正確 ← 答案** 關鍵在於 **AAH（atypical adenomatous hyperplasia）並未被納入第八版 TNM 分期系統**。根據 IASLC 肺癌分期計畫的提案：AAH 雖然被列為肺腺癌的癌前病變，但它類似於鱗狀上皮不典型增生（squamous dysplasia），因此不被納入 TNM 分類 [Journal of Thoracic Oncology](https://www.jto.org/article/S1556-0864\(16\)30335-5/fulltext)。
第八版 TNM 的新增分類是：
- **AIS → Tis**（adenocarcinoma in situ）
- **MIA → T1mi**（minimally invasive adenocarcinoma）
**選項 (D) ✅ 正確** CT 上腫瘤旁的肋膜增厚對於胸壁侵犯的判斷確實不太準確。研究顯示CT 評估胸壁侵犯的敏感度僅 38%，特異度 40%，準確度 39% [PubMed](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/3871560/)。另有研究指出在 54% 的病例中觀察到腫瘤附近的局部肋膜增厚，但其中超過一半雖有鈍角接觸卻並無腫瘤侵犯 [PubMed](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/1315670/)。CT 評估胸壁侵犯的敏感度範圍為 38%-87%，特異度為 40%-90%，唯一可靠的標準是明確的骨質破壞 [PubMed Central](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC2072091/)。

questions.questionText: 關於 Proton density-weighted images，下列何項敘述為**非**？

options.text: PD images have a signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) that is higher than any comparable T1-weighted or T2W image.
In some musculoskeletal applications, differences in PD within tissue elements is inherently high so that PDW imaging provides both excellent contrast and superior SNR.
Short TR and long TE produces proton density-weighted images.
In detection of multiple sclerosis plaques in posterior fossa, lesions could be more conspicuous on PD than on FLAIR due to better SNR.

questions.explanation:
短TR和長TE產生T2加權影像，而不是proton density-weighted images。而長TR和短TE則產生T1加權影像。
FLAIR has been shown to be superior to PD-weighted sequences in the detection of MS lesions in the cerebral hemispheres. However, PD-weighted imaging remains the investigation of choice for infratentorial lesions.
